nodes.label: extra_features_architecture.md
nodes.summary: Architecture document describing the persistence layer (PostgreSQL + Drizzle), sidebar, glassmorphism UI, and message deletion features added beyond the core proof-of-concept.

nodes.label: Glassmorphism UI
nodes.summary: UI design approach using backdrop-blur, translucent borders, and radial gradients for a layered frosted-glass aesthetic.

nodes.label: Drizzle ORM
nodes.summary: TypeScript-native ORM chosen over Prisma for NixOS compatibility; used for all database interactions in this project.

edges.note: Doc explicitly references lib/db/schema.ts and the two table definitions
Doc references docker-compose.yml as infrastructure for the DB layer
Doc explains the Drizzle ORM selection rationale over Prisma
